channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Fourth Edition of Ramamurthi and Tandon's Neurosurgery Textbook Launched in Chennai
item.description: The fourth edition of the renowned 'Ramamurthi and Tandon Textbook of Neurosurgery' was launched in Chennai at the Vol Health Services Specialty Hospital Research Centre. This comprehensive volume fea...

item.title: President Trump Calls Off Diplomatic Mission to Pakistan Amid Iran Conflict Standoff
item.description: On Saturday, April 25, 2026, President Donald Trump officially cancelled a high-level diplomatic mission to Islamabad, Pakistan, which was intended to facilitate peace negotiations regarding the ongoi...

item.title: UNODC provides advanced equipment to strengthen Tanzania’s anti-drug operations
item.description: Tanzania has received an important boost in its ongoing fight against drug trafficking and abuse, following the provision of modern laboratory equipment to the Drugs Control and Enforcement Authority ...

item.title: BINI's Jhoanna Robles Delights Fans with Guest Weather Segment on ‘Good Day LA’
item.description: BINI member Jhoanna Robles recently made a memorable appearance on the morning show 'Good Day LA,' fulfilling a personal ambition of hers in broadcasting. The young artist surprised viewers by deliver...

item.title: AI Investments in India: Addressing the Water Inequality Crisis
item.description: So, *yaar*, India's getting all these big tech companies, like Microsoft, Amazon, and Adani, wanting to set up AI data centres – it’s a *bahut* big deal! Billions of dollars are flowing in, *hai na*? ...

item.title: Manila Coliseum files administrative complaints vs CIDG officers over alleged raid irregularities
item.description: The management of Coliseo de Manila in Tondo has filed administrative complaints against 10 officers of the Criminal Investigation and Detection Group (CIDG), accusing them of misconduct during a poli...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Visits Islamabad as US Sends Envoys for West Asia Peace Talks
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi arrived in Islamabad on Friday evening to engage in talks aimed at resolving the ongoing conflict in West Asia. According to Iran’s foreign ministry spoke...

item.title: Power Shortage Causes Higher Electricity Rates and Blackouts in Several Provinces
item.description: A national energy emergency has resulted in significantly higher electricity bills for consumers and widespread power outages across several provinces in the Philippines. The situation, as reported by...

item.title: Virginia Giuffre's Family Holds Memorial Vigil in Washington Ahead of Royal Visit
item.description: Family, friends, and supporters of Virginia Giuffre gathered in Washington DC for a memorial vigil marking the first anniversary of her death. With the White House as a backdrop, her brother, Sky Robe...

item.title: Harvard Researchers Identify Gut Bacteria Molecule That May Contribute to Depression via Immune Response
item.description: Researchers at Harvard Medical School have discovered a potential molecular link between gut bacteria and depression. Their study focuses on Morganella morganii, a bacterium previously associated with...

item.title: Canberra's Illegal Tobacco Shops: A Wake-Up Call for Authorities
item.description: Canberrans have been warning about the proliferation of illegal tobacco shops across the capital for years, with authorities ignoring the issue despite numerous complaints. These shops, often in plain...

item.title: Oilers stars miss practice as Ducks take 2-1 series lead
item.description: Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid and star forward Leon Draisaitl did not take part in practice ahead of Game 4 of their first-round NHL playoff series against the Anaheim Ducks. Their absence co...

item.title: Arsenal reclaim Premier League top spot with narrow win over Newcastle despite unconvincing display
item.description: Arsenal returned to the top of the Premier League table with a tense 1-0 victory over Newcastle United, thanks to an early goal from Eberechi Eze. The win came at a crucial moment for Mikel Arteta’s s...

item.title: Six arrested after clash damages polling booth property in Tiruvannamalai
item.description: In a disturbance reported on polling day in Tamil Nadu, six individuals were arrested by the Tiruvannamalai Taluk police for allegedly damaging glass panels at a polling booth in Melpathur village, wh...

item.title: Tanzania inaugurates first deep-sea fishing vessel to boost fisheries sector
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan officially launched Tanzania’s first deep-sea fishing vessel under the Tanzania Fisheries Corporation (Tafico) at Mwalimu Nyerere Campus in Kigamboni, Dar es Salaam. This...

item.title: Kilimanjaro mother delivers quadruplets prematurely at KCMC and seeks help with medical costs
item.description: A 28-year-old woman, Ms Rachael Simba from Newland TPC in Kilimanjaro Region, has successfully delivered four premature babies at Kilimanjaro Christian Medical Centre (KCMC), in what doctors describe ...

item.title: Cleric Calls for Peaceful Dialogue to Resolve Global Conflicts
item.description: Shaykh Ahmad Dabbagh, a UK-based Islamic scholar and founder of the World Peace Movement, has emphasized that dialogue is the key to solving global conflicts. Speaking in Kano during a public lecture ...

item.title: Housing industry downplays impact of proposed capital gains tax reform
item.description: Australia’s housing industry has indicated it would largely tolerate a proposed shift by the Albanese government to wind back the current 50 per cent capital gains tax (CGT) discount and return to the...

item.title: Customer reactions examined amid Woolworths court case over discount practices
item.description: Woolworths is facing legal scrutiny over allegations that its discounting practices may have misled customers, prompting closer examination of how shoppers interpret supermarket pricing. The case cent...

item.title: Parody site mocks Alberta government over controversial referendum
item.description: A satirical website has recently drawn attention to Alberta's government by mocking a provincial referendum, playfully dubbed a 'referendumb'. The website aims to highlight perceived flaws and controv...
